name: per_period_fails_first
description: Rule has per_period_cap listed first (5000 XLM/day), then per_tx_cap (1000 XLM). Prior spend of 4900 XLM in window. tx = 200 XLM: within per_tx_cap but would push period total to 5100 XLM. per_period is listed first so it fires first. Expect PerPeriodCapExceeded.
